# Description

Implement this task.


# [PKT-PRV-011](task-0078): Provider Security Audit

## Purpose

Audit provider security.

## Scope

- Security checks
- Vulnerability scan
- Remediation

## Implementation

1. Define checks
2. Run scan
3. Remediate

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Checks defined
2. Scan complete
3. Remediated
